title: Theme Studies
description: Three independent studies for the Wes Anderson Language theme.
creative_direction: A first-pass single-image package for Wes Anderson Language: one core demonstration, one applied system, and one gallery-oriented variation, all focused on controlled in-image text and typography, structured layout and clear information hierarchy, controlled style language without losing structure, optical-illusion geometry and precise perspective, commercial presentation polish and practical product framing.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.description: Three independent studies for the Wes Anderson Language theme.
